description: Unit tests for the FocusTrap utility, testing focus management and event handling behaviors.

classes.name: FocusTrap
classes.description: A utility class for managing focus within a specified DOM element, ensuring accessibility and focus trapping.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Activates the focus trap, setting focus inside the trap element and managing focus events.

methods.name: deactivate
methods.description: Deactivates the focus trap, removing event listeners and restoring focus behavior.
